narrative: USD weakens as Iran reopens Strait of Hormuz, crude oil prices plunge — DXY steady. EUR/USD firms at 1.1787; GBP/USD extends gains to 1.3539. USD/JPY slides to 158.39 as JPY gains on reduced geopolitical risk. Gold higher +1.46% on safe-haven demand, while equities rise +1.09% and VIX at 17.6.
